summary:
Claim: Jersey finger results from rupture of the flexor digitorum profundus tendon.  
Evidence: - Originates from the anterior ulna; inserts into the base of the distal phalanx. - Located in a confined space near bony margins, creating high tensile stress at tendon-bone interfaces.  
Answer: B
